title: Phase 5: Claude Intelligence Layer - Context Engine, Tool Manifest, Convention Detection
description: Add intelligent context gathering, tool manifest generation, convention detection, and tool chaining recipes to make Claude an expert UE assistant

stories.title: Convention Detection Python Script
acceptanceCriteria: Python script at ue-plugin/Content/Python/uma/detect_conventions.py exists
Script uses @execute_wrapper and returns naming patterns, folder org, BP vs C++ ratio
Detects UE prefixes (BP_, SM_, M_, T_, MI_, WBP_, ABP_), folder organization (by-type vs by-feature), blueprint style (heavy-BP, hybrid, cpp-heavy)
Returns JSON with keys: namingPattern, folderOrganization, blueprintStyle, commonBaseClasses, inputSystem, physicsProfile, renderingApproach

stories.title: Context Auto-Gather MCP Tool
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript handler at mcp-server/src/tools/context/auto-gather.ts exists
Handler calls bridge with python.execute for context_auto_gather script
Python script at ue-plugin/Content/Python/uma/context_auto_gather.py exists
Returns ProjectContext: project info, code stats, content summary, current state, detected conventions
Tool registered in server.ts as 'context-autoGather'
Safety classified as 'safe' in safety.ts
Test file context.test.ts with 4+ tests exists and passes

stories.title: Tool Manifest Generator
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript module at mcp-server/src/tools/context/tool-manifest.ts exists
Exports generateManifest() returning ToolManifest with all 172+ tools categorized by domain
Each tool entry has: name, domain, description, safety, relatedTools
Includes tool chain recipes (add-blueprint-logic, create-material-from-textures, setup-character)
MCP tool 'context-getManifest' registered in server.ts
Safety classified as 'safe' in safety.ts
Test in context.test.ts covers manifest generation

stories.title: Tool Chain Recipes & Error Recovery Patterns
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript module at mcp-server/src/tools/context/tool-chains.ts exists
Exports TOOL_CHAINS record with 8+ named workflow chains
Each chain has: name, description, steps array with {tool, purpose}
Error recovery patterns at mcp-server/src/tools/context/error-recovery.ts exists
Exports getRecoveryStrategy(errorType, context) returning suggested tools and actions
MCP tool 'context-getChains' registered in server.ts returning available chains
Safety classified as 'safe' in safety.ts
Tests in context.test.ts cover chains and error recovery

stories.title: Phase 5 Integration, Safety & Final Verification
acceptanceCriteria: safety.ts updated with context-autoGather, context-getManifest, context-getChains as safe
safety.test.ts updated with new safe tool classifications
server.ts log updated to 173 tools across 37 domains
npm run typecheck passes with 0 errors
npm test passes with all tests (750+)
All 3 new MCP tools callable via bridge pattern
